# Contributing to Commander Tracker

Commander Tracker is mostly a personal passion project to solve some issues my playgroup had when using some online clients to play MTG, and as such doesn't really have a defined shape to it. If you would like to help, feel free to test it, break everything, and [open issues](https://github.com/Michael-A-Dev/Commander-Tracker/issues) when you encounter bugs or want to submit a feature request.

In the future, I'd like to add some coding standards and the like, but that will likely come about when I feel like it. Feel free to submit a PR however, and as long as it's not a hot mess it should be fine. :D

Thank you for wanting to contribute to this project! ❤️


## Contributor License Agreement

By contributing to this project, I understand that my contributions to this project will fall under the GPL-2.0 license.
